channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in C++ (Monthly)

item.description:
👤 Owner: Percivalll

📝 Repository: Percivalll/Copy-Fail-CVE-2026-31431-Kubernetes-PoC

📄 Descrizione: PoC: fully unprivileged container escape to node-level code execution on Kubernetes via CVE-2026-31431 page-cache corruption + shared image layers. Validated on Alibaba Cloud ACK, Amazon EKS and Google GKE.

⭐ Stelle: 136

🍴 Forks: 23

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: container-escape cve-2026-31431 eks exploit kubernetes linux-kernel privilege-escalation proof-of-concept security-research vulnerability
